name: upvote-club
description: Promote any link with real engagement: create upvote, like, comment and follow tasks on Upvote.club straight from Claude.
long_description:
Upvote.club is a community-powered promotion platform: real members upvote, like, comment, follow, star and share your content across 18 platforms (Reddit, Product Hunt, Hacker News, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, GitHub, Quora, YouTube and more).

With this extension you can send Claude a link to promote — Claude detects the platform, picks the right action and creates a promotion task via the Upvote.club API. Track progress and cancel tasks (automatic refund of unused points) without leaving the chat.

**Requirements:** Upvote.club MATE plan and an API key (https://upvote.club/api).

tools.name: list_platforms
tools.description: List supported platforms, actions and minimum prices

tools.name: list_api_keys
tools.description: List active API key metadata (requires JWT in UPVOTE_JWT env if configured)

tools.name: generate_api_key
tools.description: Generate a new API key (requires JWT)

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a promotion task — spends account points

tools.name: get_task_status
tools.description: Get progress of one or more promotion tasks

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Delete a promotion task and refund unused points

api_key.title: Upvote.club API Key
api_key.description: Your personal API key from https://upvote.club/api (MATE plan). Starts with upv_.
